title: passiflora eriantha
intro: Passiflora eriantha, also known as the purple granadilla, is a species of flowering plant in the family Passifloraceae. This tropical vine is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Passiflora eriantha include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating menstrual cramps. Passiflora eriantha is often used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, and is also available in capsule or tablet form.
